meta.tech_stack: Next.js 16 App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Fabric.js, Zustand, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL
meta.ssot_file: CLAUDE.md (repository root) governs technical implementation. This file governs brand, visuals, and voice.

logo.description: Official QuiltCorgi logo. Primary lockup on light backgrounds (--bg or --surface). Use Next.js <Image> with priority on header/hero, alt='QuiltCorgi'. Clear space: minimum 1.5x logo height on all sides. Never distort, filter, or recolor.

mascot.name: Corgi
mascot.description: Quiet companion, never demanding attention. One corgi per screen maximum. Positioned in corners or negative space, never center-stage, never blocks content.

pose_purposes.sitting: Empty states, welcome moments, calm presence

usage_rules: One corgi per screen maximum (community gallery: quilter avatars take priority)
Never animated beyond simple pose changes
Never blocks content or interface elements
Positioned in corners or negative space, never center-stage
Marked decorative or given descriptive alt text
Primary use: user avatars (selected during onboarding, auto-assigned if skipped)
The corgi is a companion, not the product

voice.tone: Warm, conversational, like your quilting friend who is always excited to see what you are working on. Friendly yet precise. Celebrate the craft and the community equally.

tone_by_moment.design_workspace: Your blocks are coming together nicely.
tone_by_moment.community_features: See what others are making with this pattern.
tone_by_moment.sharing: Ready to show your work? The community would love to see it.
tone_by_moment.discovery: Found a design you love? Save it for inspiration.

rules: Always say 'quilter' not 'user' in UI-facing text
No exclamation points unless truly earned
No AI slop or generic template language

usage_rules: Light mode only. No dark mode.
Warm, fabric-friendly tones that let quilts shine.
Primary (#ff8d49) for buttons, key actions, corgi accents.
Secondary (#ffc8a6) for subtle supports, dividers, inactive states.
No arbitrary colors outside this palette.
No gray-*, slate-*, or brown-toned neutrals.

rules: Spline Sans for all headings and display text
Inter for all body copy, labels, and UI text
No heavy uppercase tracking unless explicitly specified for a label

design_system.radius: Buttons/CTAs/tabs/filters/pills: rounded-full (pill shape) everywhere. Cards/containers/inputs/dialogs: rounded-lg (8px). No rounded-none, no rounded-2xl. rounded-full on avatar containers remains standard.

motion.transitions: 150ms ease-out on color and opacity ONLY
motion.hover: Color or background change ONLY. No scale, translate, lift, shift, or transform.
motion.loading: Subtle opacity pulse. No spinners, no animated corgi.
motion.entry_exit: Allowed. Framer Motion animations are permitted for page transitions, drawer slides, and component entrances/exits.

buttons.primary: bg-[#ff8d49] text-[#1a1a1a] px-6 py-2 rounded-full hover:bg-[#e67d3f] transition-colors duration-150 shadow-[0_1px_2px_rgba(45,42,38,0.08)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#ff8d49] text-[#ff8d49] rounded-full hover:bg-[#ff8d49]/10 transition-colors duration-150
rules: Pill shape (rounded-full) for CTA buttons, tabs, filters, small interactive elements
Quilt image fills card, no decorative overlays
No hover effects that obscure content
Sidebar is fixed-width, collapsible, never overlays content
No hamburger menus on desktop (studio hamburger is an exception for file/edit/view actions)

banned_patterns: Hover effects that move, scale, lift, or shift elements (no hover:scale-*, hover:-translate-*, hover:translate-*)
Soft drop shadows beyond the single defined shadow
text-gray-*, text-slate-*, bg-gray-*, bg-slate-*, border-gray-*, border-slate-*
Brown-toned neutral scales (#2c2420, #4a3f35, #6b5d50, #8a7c6f, #e8dbcf as neutral ramps)
Vanity metrics (visible like counts, follower counts, engagement scores)
AI-generated filler text or generic template language
Generic stock photography or AI-generated art
font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] editorial patterns (use Spline Sans at normal weight instead)

pages_log._instructions: Maintain this log. After every page built or modified, add/update the entry. Track all images, icons, graphics per page to prevent duplication and ensure consistency.

pages.purpose: Homepage marketing — hero, features, workspace preview, capabilities, CTA
pages.layout: Full-width with PublicNav header and Footer
pages.consistency_notes: ENHANCED — Added QuiltPiece decorative backgrounds with dashed stitch outlines across all sections (Hero, Features, Workspace, Capabilities, Social, CTA). All CTA buttons now use rounded-full pill shape with brand shadow. Feature cards use rounded-xl with QuiltPiece decorations. Check items use rounded-full icons. Section headers have QuiltPieceRow dot decorations. Cards and mockups have rounded-xl.

pages.purpose: About page — brand story and mission
pages.consistency_notes: USES text-secondary instead of text-[#6b655e]. Generally clean. PageHeader component should be checked for brand compliance.

pages.purpose: Contact page — email support link
pages.consistency_notes: REMEDIATED — brand compliant. All Material tokens replaced with brand hex colors, rounded-full on cards/containers replaced with rounded-lg (buttons keep rounded-full per brand spec), transition-all duration-300 replaced with transition-colors duration-150, font-black uppercase tracking patterns replaced with brand typography scale.

pages.consistency_notes: REMEDIATED — brand compliant. All font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] section headers replaced with h3 text-[#2d2a26] normal weight, Material tokens (text-on-surface/bg-surface-container-high) replaced with brand hex colors, rounded-full decorative dots replaced with rounded-lg.

pages.purpose: Reusable decorative fabric-square component with optional dashed stitch outline
pages.description: Renders an SVG with opaque fabric fill (brand colors) and optional thick dashed 'stitch' border. Used as background decoration across pages. QuiltPieceRow renders small decorative dots. QuiltPieceBand renders scattered pieces across a horizontal band.
pages.usage: Place as absolute-positioned decorative elements behind content. opacity typically 5-15%. stitch prop controls dashed outline visibility.

design_workspace.rotate_tooltip: Turn the piece. See what clicks.
design_workspace.empty_canvas: Start with a block, or import a pattern to explore.

community.empty_gallery: No one has shared this type of design yet. Be the first?

discovery.pattern_search: Find a pattern to start with

accessibility.focus_states: 2px solid --primary outline on all interactive elements
accessibility.images: Descriptive alt text required. Mascot images: decorative or descriptive as appropriate.

what_we_dont_do: Hover animations that shift layout or move elements
Generic stock photography or AI-generated art
